assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope but doesn't mention 30-day maximum limit or specifically call it a 'no upgrades' exclusion type

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope but doesn't specifically identify it as a 'no upgrades' exclusion type or mention its characteristics

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion for ongoing minor upgrade control — allows CP patches but blocks disruptive changes
assertions.reason: Does not use or mention 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion type; only uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope and disables auto-upgrade on node pools

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the difference between exclusion types and their duration limits

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope='all_upgrades' flags for both exclusions

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows; only shows manual upgrade commands without this clarification

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
